"[41] RP THAT WAS THE LEAD VEH IN THIS INCIDENT JUST CALLED - ADVS SHE WAS IN A WHI CHEV TRAX VS A UNK WHI CAR - THE UNK WHI CAR RAN A RED LIGHT - HIT RP'S MIRROR - STOPPED TO GET HER INFO - PEOPLE YELLED AT HER - DRIVER NEVER GOT OO THE CAR - OCCUPANTS SPOKE CHINEESE - ONLY GOT A NAME AND NUMBER - NO LEGAL DOCUMENTS AND LEFT - WILL FILE A COUNTER REPORT IF NEEDED - NFD [Shared]"
"[38] B115-039 CLR'D ITSELF OUT NOW - NO 1125 [Shared]"
"[35] A FEW PEOPLE ARE OUT OF VEH'S DIRECTING TRAFFIC AROUND.... [Shared]"
"[33] [33] ** RP UPDATED - TRAFFIC IS MOVING BETTER NOW, AFA IN TOYT RAV4 IS PULLED OVER NOW, WAS 1125 IN ROADWAY [Shared][Shared]"
